input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.7.1
            TITLE: must monitor for the two conditions:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.7.1: Must monitor for the two conditions:
EV.4.7.1 Must monitor for the two conditions: 
• The mechanical brakes are engaged  EV.4.6,  T.3.2.4   
• The APPS signals more than 25% Pedal Travel  EV.4.5

final_answer: rule EV.4.7.1: Must monitor for the two conditions: • The mechanical brakes are engaged EV.4.6, T.3.2.4 • The APPS signals more than 25% Pedal Travel EV.4.5
